name: Initial Release 🎉
note: This release brings a whole fresh new look on the website, making things easier to navigate and read, alongside a small batch of new games. Enjoy what 5166 Gamez has in store, and expect many changes and additions beyond this release! Also, most of the games that are not present but were during the original Google Sites version will return through future patches/hotfixes.

changes.title: Additions
items: Similar Games section under loaded games that share the same category
Added 2 new contact methods; Version Feedback & Suggestions/Feedback
Added a fade-in animation for game cards loading
Added a link dropdown to the header

changes.title: Changes
items: Updated changelogs page to include release searching and type filtering
Updated page information headers to include the icon and description
Intigrated themes dropdown into the settings panel under Site Preferences
Replaced every placeholder icon with a new one (except for Machinery still)
